payload.title: BMW expands deployment of Figure AI humanoid robots in US manufacturing
payload.summary: BMW significantly increased the use of Figure AI's humanoid robots across its US vehicle production and logistics facilities, including advanced tactile sensing capabilities at the Spartanburg plant.

payload.title: Figure AI transitions to a robot-first workforce model
payload.summary: Figure AI reported that its workforce now comprises more robots than humans, indicating a strategic shift toward robot-dominant operations within the company.
